description_long: This is a tall, two-tiered celebration cake with a vibrant blue exterior and a dramatic drip effect in orange and yellow icing running down the sides of both tiers. The top of the cake is lavishly decorated with a variety of colorful candies, including large rainbow swirl lollipops, round gumballs, and twisted candy sticks that protrude vertically, creating a whimsical and festive appearance. The cake sits on a round, rustic wooden board with a white dusting, possibly powdered sugar, around its base. The surface of the cake is smooth and glossy, with the decorations adding texture and visual interest. The overall style is playful and eye-catching, making it suitable for parties or urban celebrations. The cake's height and elaborate decorations make it a striking centerpiece in any urban setting.
description: A tall, two-tiered blue cake with orange-yellow drip icing, topped with colorful candies and lollipops, displayed on a rustic wooden board. Its playful, festive decorations make it a striking centerpiece.
description_view_0: From this top-down angle, the vibrant candy decorations and lollipops on the cake's upper tier are most prominent, highlighting the playful arrangement and the orange drip icing.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the height of the cake and the vertical arrangement of the lollipops, with the wooden board and white dusting clearly visible.
description_view_2: Seen from a lower angle, the protruding lollipops and the smooth blue icing with orange drips are highlighted, showing the cake's cylindrical shape and layered structure.
description_view_3: This view showcases the side of the cake with a clear look at the candy decorations and the even distribution of the drip icing, as well as the sturdy wooden display board.
